ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apartments" (
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apartment */,
  "apartment_no" INTEGER /* Apartment number */,
  "apartment_category" TEXT /* Apartment category (‘D’ for Delux, ‘S’ for SuperDelux) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the apartment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the apartment */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the apartment */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the apartment */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the apartment */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the apartment was constructed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the apartment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchasers" (
  "purchaser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchaser */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the purchaser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the purchaser */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the purchaser */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the purchaser */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the purchaser */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the purchaser */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the purchaser */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the purchaser */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the purchaser */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the purchaser registered in the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the purchaser record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchaser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apartment being sold */,
  "purchaser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchaser */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" TEXT /* Sale price of the apartment */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission paid to the sales agent */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, check, credit card) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent who made the sale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_purchaser_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchaser_id") REFERENCES purchasers ("purchaser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Delux, SuperDelux) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "standard_cost" TEXT /* Standard cost of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the category record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the location record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apartment_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apartment */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., amenity, room) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the feature record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartment_features_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, sales agent) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apartment_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apartment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., exterior, interior) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the image record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartment_images_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apartment_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apartment */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., text, video) */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchaser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the review record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartment_reviews_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartment_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES purchasers ("purchaser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apartment_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apartment */,
  "available_from" TEXT /* Date the apartment is available from */,
  "available_to" TEXT /* Date the apartment is available to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the availability (e.g., available, reserved, sold) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the availability record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartment_availability_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id")
)
